prompt_text: Compare Ashby and Lever for manage the full recruiting funnel from sourcing to offer letter
response:
# Ashby vs Lever: Full Recruiting Funnel Comparison

## **Sourcing**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Job Board Posting** | Native integration with major boards | Strong multi-board distribution |
| **ATS-native sourcing** | Better built-in sourcing tools | Relies more on integrations |
| **Resume parsing** | Excellent accuracy | Very good, mature tech |
| **Candidate database** | Solid, searchable talent pool | Robust with good filtering |

**Edge: Lever** (slightly more established integrations)

---

## **Candidate Management & Pipeline**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Pipeline visualization** | Modern, highly customizable | Clean, intuitive boards |
| **Workflow automation** | Very strong; easy to build custom workflows | Good but more manual setup |
| **Bulk actions** | Excellent | Good but less powerful |
| **Candidate profiles** | Clean, modern design | Comprehensive but busier UI |

**Edge: Ashby** (superior automation and customization)

---

## **Screening & Assessment**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Built-in screening** | Strong native tools | Limited native capabilities |
| **Assessment integrations** | Good selection | Excellent (Codility, Talentify, etc.) |
| **Email campaigns** | Powerful and native | Good but more basic |
| **Video interviews** | Native integration | Integrates with third parties |

**Edge: Lever** (better assessment ecosystem; Ashby better for pure recruiting flow)

---

## **Collaboration & Communication**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Team scorecards** | Excellent design | Very good |
| **Interview feedback** | Modern, structured | Solid framework |
| **Slack integration** | Great | Great |
| **Internal notes** | Clean, easy to use | Comprehensive |
| **Async collaboration** | Better | Good |

**Edge: Ashby** (slightly more modern UX)

---

## **Offer & Acceptance**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Offer letters** | Customizable templates | Customizable templates |
| **E-signature** | Native support | Integrates with DocuSign, etc. |
| **Offer tracking** | Good visibility | Solid tracking |
| **Acceptance workflows** | Good | Good |

**Edge: Tie** (both adequate; Lever slightly more flexible with integrations)

---

## **Reporting & Analytics**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Pipeline metrics** | Excellent dashboards | Good but less modern |
| **DEI tracking** | Strong | Strong |
| **Custom reports** | Very flexible | More limited |
| **Data export** | Excellent | Good |

**Edge: Ashby** (more modern analytics platform)

---

## **Integration Ecosystem**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **HRIS (Workday, BambooHR)** | Good | Excellent |
| **Background checks** | Good integrations | More partners |
| **Email (Gmail, Outlook)** | Native | Native |
| **Slack** | Native | Native |
| **Third-party tools** | Growing but fewer | More mature ecosystem |

**Edge: Lever** (more enterprise integrations)

---

## **Implementation & Onboarding**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Setup time** | 2-4 weeks | 2-4 weeks |
| **Customer support** | Good, responsive | Very good, established |
| **Training resources** | Growing | Extensive |
| **Customization complexity** | Moderate | High (more configuration needed) |

**Edge: Lever** (more support resources; Ashby easier setup)

---

## **Cost**

| Aspect | Ashby | Lever |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Pricing model** | Per-seat + per-hire | Per-seat + per-hire |
| **Starting
